source: RuneQuest Starter Set Book 2: The World of Glorantha (2021)

overview.summary: Runes are cosmic archetypes, including Elements, Powers, Conditions, and Forms. An adventurer's affinity with different Runes affects magical potential, personality, and characteristics.

form_runes.name: Beast
form_runes.detail: Associated with dragon progenitors and four-legged creatures.

form_runes.name: Man
form_runes.detail: Represents the humanoid shape and Grandfather Mortal.

form_runes.name: Plant
form_runes.detail: Symbol of the first life on Glorantha.

form_runes.name: Dragonewt
form_runes.detail: Exotic rune associated with Dragonewts and found only in the Dragon Pass area.

form_runes.name: Spirit
form_runes.detail: Describes disembodied entities existing in the Spirit World.

form_runes.name: Chaos
form_runes.detail: Describes beings tainted by Chaos and can combine with any other Rune.

condition_runes.name: Mastery
condition_runes.detail: Can symbolize the mastery of mortals, magic, or elements.

condition_runes.name: Magic
condition_runes.detail: Describes how a cult or individual deals with the power of another Rune.

condition_runes.name: Infinity
condition_runes.detail: Mark of the gods, implying near total control of power flow and resistance to magic.

condition_runes.name: Luck
condition_runes.detail: Thought to be both an expression of Chaos and the gods' approval.

condition_runes.name: Fate
condition_runes.detail: Used to express the way of the world, often by downtrodden or dominant cultures alike.

classification_notes.elements: The Elements are what Glorantha is made of.
classification_notes.powers: Power Runes are antagonistic pairs defined against their opposites.
classification_notes.forms: Form Runes describe how a power or element is expressed.
classification_notes.conditions: Condition Runes indicate which aspect of an Element, Form, or Power is favored.
